name: lba1&2
cooked:
Hello everyone,

i am quite knew here (look at my posts!)

Anyway i read about being able to change your charecter and be some one else e.g Zoe

but i could never work out how to do it?? Could someone please tell me anything about it.

thanks in advance.
raw:
Hello everyone,

i am quite knew here (look at my posts!) :D

Anyway i read about being able to change your charecter and be some one else e.g Zoe

but i could never work out how to do it?? Could someone please tell me anything about it.

thanks in advance. :)

cooked:
Hi.

First of all, get LBA Package Editor. It allows you to edit HQR files from the original LBA games.
Go into your LBA 1/2 folder and create a backup of Body.HQR. Then open the original with the Package Editor. You get a list of characters. Choose the character you want to play with and click Extract selected entries. Save the file somewhere.
Then go to the first few entries all belonging to Twinsen, select them all, and click Replace selected entries with and load the file you saved before.
Next to output file, click on the green arrow. Then say build output file.

Play the game.
When youre finished having fun, get your backup of body.HQR back to your LBA folder.

And feel free to ask if theres something you dont understand.
raw:
Hi. :)

First of all, get [LBA Package Editor](http://moonbase.szwol6.net/index.php?page=d_prog). It allows you to edit HQR files from the original LBA games.
Go into your LBA 1/2 folder and create a backup of Body.HQR. Then open the original with the Package Editor. You get a list of characters. Choose the character you want to play with and click "Extract selected entries". Save the file somewhere.
Then go to the first few entries all belonging to "Twinsen", select them all, and click "Replace selected entries with..." and load the file you saved before.
Next to output file, click on the green arrow. Then say "build output file".

Play the game.
When you're finished having fun, get your backup of body.HQR back to your LBA folder. ;)

And feel free to ask if there's something you don't understand.

cooked:
Kobold:

Hi.

First of all, get LBA Package Editor. It allows you to edit HQR files from the original LBA games.
Go into your LBA 1/2 folder and create a backup of Body.HQR. Then open the original with the Package Editor. You get a list of characters. Choose the character you want to play with and click Extract selected entries. Save the file somewhere.
Then go to the first few entries all belonging to Twinsen, select them all, and click Replace selected entries with and load the file you saved before.
Next to output file, click on the green arrow. Then say build output file.

Play the game.
When youre finished having fun, get your backup of body.HQR back to your LBA folder.

And feel free to ask if theres something you dont understand.

If you only want to change to another character without editing him, you dont need to save it. Only drag the body entry you want to replace in the place you want or press F2 in the entry you want to edit and write > entry number of the deserved character.
